findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "whale_movements" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Public whale movements archive — paginated 1-year history (no auth, MCP-compatible) — Returns a paginated archive of large whale on-chain movements recorded in …

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "whale_movements_summary" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Whale movements summary — aggregated stats rollup (no auth, MCP-compatible) — Returns an aggregated statistics rollup of whale on-chain movements over a period,…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "feed_archive" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: News feed archive — paginated 30-day history (public, MCP-compatible) — Returns a paginated archive of crypto news articles, analysis, and AI-generated summarie…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "analyst_monthly_performance" stacks urgency/override words (always, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Monthly performance summary for all analysts (last 6 months) — Returns win_rate, avg_return, and total_signals per analyst per calendar month for exactly the la…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: feed_archive, reports_index · Private data: platform_stats, trending, funding_rates, liquidations, market_heatmap, narratives, burn_tracker, sentiment_history, funding_rates_history, whale_daily_summary, social_summary, whale_activity, analysts, analysts_signals, analysts_signals_all, analysts_top, analyst_archive, whale_movements, feed_archive, golden_alerts_snapshot, golden_alerts_history, golden_alerts_monthly, whale_monthly_archive, fear_greed_monthly, sentiment_monthly, funding_rate_monthly, arbitrage_history, analyst_daily_summary, analyst_summary_history, arbitrage_monthly, fear_greed_history · Public sink: reports_index.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: feed_archive, reports_index · Private data: platform_stats, trending, funding_rates, liquidations, market_heatmap, narratives, burn_tracker, sentiment_history, funding_rates_history, whale_daily_summary, social_summary, whale_activity, analysts, analysts_signals, analysts_signals_all, analysts_top, analyst_archive, whale_movements, feed_archive, golden_alerts_snapshot, golden_alerts_history, golden_alerts_monthly, whale_monthly_archive, fear_greed_monthly, sentiment_monthly, funding_rate_monthly, arbitrage_history, analyst_daily_summary, analyst_summary_history, arbitrage_monthly, fear_greed_history · Public sink: reports_index

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
